name: Small Security Blanket Dinosaur - Pink - Cloud Island™
description:
This Small Security Blanket from cloud island™ makes a cute, dino-mite companion for your little one. Made with a soft faux-fur fabric, this cuddly baby accessory is a peach-colored handkerchief-shaped blanket with white spots and striped satin trim in a lighter shade. It is topped with a plush dinosaur head with three yellow spikes, a circular neck frame and adorable little arms that will instantly catch your little one's attention and encourage them to play and snuggle to their heart's desire.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
